item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 170830Z AUTO 26005KT 200V310 CAVOK 23/18 Q1015 NOSIG
🟡 TAF LFOT 170500Z 1706/1806 30010KT CAVOK PROB30 TEMPO 1706/1708 VRB10KT FEW100CB PROB40 TEMPO 1714/1717 FEW100CB TEMPO 1717/1721 VRB15G25KT BKN080CB PROB40 TEMPO 1717/1721 -TSRA PROB30 TEMPO 1717/1721 VRB15G35KT
